title: Client Relationship Manager - Insurance
description:
The Opportunity:

The Singapore business Unit – part of Cognizant APJ – is one of the strongest growing regions in APAC.As part of these growth plans, we are looking for a dynamic Client Partner to manage and grow exponentially a significant part of its portfolio in the banking space.

Responsibilities:

  • Lead a key account in BFS managing the business as a P&L with accountability for the profitable growth of the account.
  • Develop and nurture senior relationships within the account including at the Executive level.
  • Strategic account planning following Cognizant’s annual cycle and maintaining the account plan as a ‘living document’.
  • Forming and maintaining a strong account team focused on working together to deliver the account plan targets and exceed customer expectations.
  • Working closely with the Delivery organization, Service Lines, Consulting and DBO to achieve successful outcomes for the client and Cognizant.
  • Accountability for all operational aspects of the account including sales and pipeline management, forecasting, people management, margin improvement plans, and managing attrition and retention.
  • Working with key alliance partners to support the account plan and client’s business aspirations.
  • Collaborating with the Digital Network to support the account plan, identifying opportunities to work together for collective success.
  • People management of the account CRMs providing appropriate guidance, mentoring and career development opportunities.  
  • Participating as part of the BFS leadership team.
  • Participating in industry events and promoting Cognizant’s brand with the client and in the broader market.

Requirements:

  • Demonstrated account management experience working with large Banks
  • Strong people skills and EQ
  • Demonstrated business development experience, proposal and bid management skills, and a growth mindset
  • Understanding of the Banking landscape in Singapore (banking practitioner)
  • Experience developing account plans
  • Strategic thinking skills
  • Proven track-record of winning large deals
  • Strong negotiation skills
  • Consultative skills and solution-oriented mindset focusing on transformative solutions bringing blended teams together where appropriate
  • Demonstrated relationship management skills and a passion and interest in engaging senior level executives
  • Advanced presentations skills
  • Client obsession (‘insanely curious’ about the client) Ability to navigate a large organization, work in a multi-dimensional matrix and have the power of persuasion through content and confidence
  • Strong understanding of Cognizant’s systems and processes to facilitate the successful operation of the account and team
  • Excellent communication and facilitation skills
  • Ability to work with geographically distributed teams
  • Strong teaming skills, focusing on developing a ‘one team approach’

About Cognizant:

 

Cognizant (Nasdaq-100: CTSH) engineers modern businesses. We help our clients modernize technology, reimagine processes and transform experiences so they can stay ahead in our fast-changing world. Together, we’re improving everyday life. See how at www.cognizant.com or @cognizant.
